title: Figure 4 from: Rathnayaka AR, Chethana KWT, Manowong A, Bhagya AT, Win H, Tun ZL, Mapook A, Hyde KD (2025) Taxonomy, phylogeny, and bioactive potential of Xylariales (Sordariomycetes, Ascomycota) from Thailand: novel species discovery, new host and geographical records, and antibacterial properties. MycoKeys 120: 35-117. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.120.155915
author: Rathnayaka, Achala R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 4 Annulohypoxylon bahnphadengense on dead wood of Berrya cordifolia (MFLU 24-0526, a new host record). a. Substrate; b, c. Appearance of ascostromata on host; d, e. Horizontal section through ascomata (arrow shows the ostiolar disc); f. Peridium; g. Paraphyses; h–m. Asci; n. Apical apparatus stained blue with Melzer's reagent; o–q. Ascospores; r. Germinated ascospores; s, t. Colony on the PDA (s upper, t lower). Scale bars: 2 mm (b); 1 mm (c); 500 μm (d); 200 μm (e); 20 μm (f, g, i–m); 10 μm (h, r); 5 μm (n–q).
